analysis.summary: A tag for implementing text-to-speech (TTS) functionality in Taskmaster CLI commands, enabling voice output with configurable options.
CLI command implementation for starting task execution via claude-code integration, following Commander pattern with prompt building and execution flow orchestration.
capabilities: Build standardized prompts with task details

analysis.summary: Foundation phase for tm-core package establishing the core architecture with AI provider abstraction, storage layer, configuration management, and a facade pattern entry point for task management operations.

Core tag encompassing the complete Task Master AI project - a CLI-based task management system with AI-powered task generation, expansion, and project planning capabilities using multiple LLM providers.
themes: Multi-provider LLM integration (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, Perplexity, Ollama)
capabilities: Parse PRDs into structured task hierarchies
AI-driven task expansion with subtask generation
Multiple AI provider support with fallback chains
GitHub issue import/export with bidirectional linking
Tagged task lists for multi-context management
keyEntities: AI services (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, Perplexity, Ollama, Grok)

analysis.summary: Task Integration Layer for Kiro IDE hooks and Taskmaster coordination, providing automated task lifecycle management, dependency monitoring, multi-source hook processing (event/prompt/update-based), safety controls, and a real-time React dashboard for orchestrating AI-assisted development workflows.
themes: AI prompt interception and context injection
capabilities: Coordinate Kiro hooks with Taskmaster task lifecycle
Monitor dependencies in real-time via MCP integration
Execute tasks with priority scheduling and parallel processing
Enforce safety limits with user approval workflows and emergency stop
Process file system, Git, and build system events
Intercept AI prompts to inject task context and suggest tasks
Track code changes and validate acceptance criteria automatically
Visualize automation status, dependency graphs, and execution history
Manage hook configurations with import/export and validation

analysis.summary: A loop module implementing an iterative Claude Code CLI execution framework with preset-based prompts, progress tracking, and completion detection for automated development workflows like test coverage, linting, and code quality tasks.
capabilities: spawn and manage Claude Code CLI iterations
resolve preset names to prompt content
detect loop completion or blocked states
track progress across iterations via progress.txt
expose loop operations via CLI command and MCP tool

analysis.summary: TDD automation infrastructure providing AI-orchestrated test-driven development workflows with state machine management, git safety, and multi-interface agent integration (CLI/MCP).
capabilities: Global runtime state and artifact storage
Safe git branching/committing/pushing with confirmation gates
Conventional commit generation with task metadata
CLI and MCP interfaces for AI agent integration

analysis.summary: CLI command infrastructure for an "autopilot" feature that automates Test-Driven Development (TDD) workflows, including preflight checks, task validation, execution planning, and dry-run mode for previewing automated development cycles.
capabilities: Test runner and git state detection

analysis.summary: An autonomous Test-Driven Development workflow orchestration system that manages the complete Red-Green-Commit cycle, integrating git operations, test execution, coverage enforcement, and PR creation into a state-machine-driven automation pipeline.
themes: Test framework abstraction and multi-framework support
Real-time monitoring via event streaming and TUI
Intelligent test targeting and subtask dependency resolution
Automated PR creation with run reports
capabilities: Autonomous TDD cycle execution for subtasks
Git operations via adapter pattern (commit, branch, PR)
Run state persistence and logging for traceability
Tag-branch mapping with automatic context switching
Real-time workflow progress monitoring via event streaming
